title: assonia rubifolia
intro: Assonia rubifolia, also known as the red-flowering Assonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it beneficial for reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and protecting against infections. Assonia rubifolia can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as to support the immune system.
